ai_features_disclosed.description: Suggests sentence completions as employees draft internal meeting notes. Suggestions are non-binding; the user accepts, edits, or rejects each. No content is generated unprompted.
Detects bulleted lists, headings, and action items in plain-text notes and applies markdown formatting. Pure text-structure inference; no semantic content.

training_data_sources: Common Crawl English-language subset (publicly available, no customer data)

pii_processing_claims.handling_notes: Vendor states that note content is not retained server-side beyond a 24-hour rolling cache for sync; no model training on customer content. Customer notes never leave the customer's tenant.

data_residency.conditions: Canadian customer data stored in CA-CENTRAL-1; US OpenAI API calls go through Microsoft Azure with EU/US data localization clauses; no transfers outside North America.
